raw_transcript: Doctor: Namaste Ramesh ji, kay jhalay? Ramesh: Namaste doctor, mujhe teen din se continuous fever hai aani doka dukhat aahe. Doctor: Thand lagte ka? Cold? Ramesh: Ho, thand vajte ratri. Doctor: Kuch aur? Ramesh: Bhook nahi lag rahi. I feel very weak. Doctor: Okay, let me check your fever. Temperature 102 hai. Aap wo wali tablet lijiye jo pichli baar di thi, and ek paracetamol start kijiye.

extracted_data.chief_complaint: Persistent fever and headache for 3 days
extracted_data.follow_up: Check back in 3 days if fever persists
flags: wo wali tablet - unclear medication reference
